q1_coverage_gaps.notes: All entry points covered. NEEDS_DEEPER: PH-11, PH-17, PH-21, PH-24.

loops.reason: PH-17 (fe_catch_all path traversal), PH-11 (room_id traversal), PH-24 (plan_id traversal), PH-21 (read_room subprocess) needed deeper investigation.

findings.PH-17_resolution: VALIDATED_CONDITIONAL — uvicorn confirmed to NOT normalize '..' in paths (only URL-decodes). FastAPI {path:path} converter passes '..' verbatim. Python Path / '..' constructs non-normalized path. OS resolves '..' during stat()/open(). File serving works. HOWEVER: FE_OUT_DIR does not exist in current deployment (USE_FE=False), so the catch-all route is NOT registered at runtime. Vulnerability is latent — triggers when frontend is built and deployed.
findings.PH-11_resolution: VALIDATED — FastAPI {room_id} (non-path type) DOES match '..' as a single path segment. '/api/rooms/../action' routes with room_id='..'. WARROOMS_DIR / '..' = project directory, which exists. status file write confirmed at one level above WARROOMS_DIR. Limited impact (controlled strings only to a file named 'status').
findings.PH-24_resolution: VALIDATED — FastAPI {plan_id} also matches '..'. '/api/plans/../status' routes with plan_id='..'. plans_dir / '../.meta.json' reads/writes one level above PLANS_DIR. Impact limited by .meta.json suffix requirement.
findings.PH-21_resolution: NEEDS_DEEPER (reduced) — debug_test.ps1 script not found in scope; subprocess execution of fixed command confirmed but impact unknown without script content. Chain via working_dir injection + filesystem write confirmed at mechanism level. Still fragile (requires write access to filesystem directory).

q1_coverage_gaps.notes: All 25 entry points now covered with validated or partially validated findings.

q3_fragile_items_remaining: PH-21 — read_room subprocess: script content unknown; fragile preconditions
loops.reason: All entry points covered. PH-17 validated (conditional on FE build). PH-11 and PH-24 validated. Only PH-21 remains NEEDS_DEEPER with low severity. No significant uncovered gaps remain. Proceeding to summary.
